meta.name: Loadout
meta.author: aquiloplays
meta.description: The ultimate Streamer.bot suite. One import, everything ready.

subActions.name: Loadout: Boot
subActions.description: Bootstrap. Downloads Loadout.dll on first run, opens onboarding.

subActions.name: Loadout: Event
subActions.description: Funnel for follows, subs, raids, super chats, TikTok gifts (via custom WS).

subActions.name: Loadout: Chat
subActions.description: Every chat message - drives welcomes, hate-raid detection, activity gate.

subActions.name: Loadout: Tick
subActions.description: 60-second tick. Drives timed messages and hype-train decay.

subActions.name: Loadout: !linkapprove
subActions.description: !linkapprove <id> - mod-only approval of a link request.

subActions.name: Open Loadout Settings
subActions.description: Right-click and Run Now to open the Settings window.

subActions.name: Open Loadout Onboarding
subActions.description: Right-click and Run Now to re-open the onboarding wizard.

subActions.name: Aquilo Relay
subActions.description: 4s poll of the Loadout relay; republishes overlay events onto the Aquilo Bus (ws 7470).

subActions.name: Loadout: Scratch Tamper
subActions.description: Bounded scratch-off control tamper (invert mouse, swap WASD, force jump, etc). Triggered by a scratch.tamper bus message via a WebSocket Client; auto-reverts and never wedges input. See SCRATCH-OFF-STREAMERBOT.md.
